top_signals.title: World Bank Says Two-Thirds of Economies Face Hit From Iran War
top_signals.summary: The World Bank cut its outlook for global growth this year and said two-thirds of economies have seen prospects deteriorate as the Middle East war disrupts commodity flows and raises the cost of imports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB raises interest rates for first time since 2023
top_signals.summary: Central bank is first in G7 to increase borrowing costs in response to Middle East energy crisis
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia ‘not looking for conflict’, says Nato’s top US commander
top_signals.summary: General Grynkewich’s remarks come as Washington withdraws key assets from Europe
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: German air show opens under shadow of Iran war, fighter project collapse
top_signals.summary: Airbus, which represented Germany and Spain in FCAS, is increasingly looking to Sweden’s Saab as a preferred partner, according to sources.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World Bank warns El Niño risks driving up global food prices
top_signals.summary: Weather phenomenon threatens to worsen problems for farmers already dealing with high fertiliser costs due to Iran war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury yields are steady after hot producer prices reading, crude oil gains - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Treasury yields are steady after hot producer prices reading, crude oil gains  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Cascading Failure: The Spanish Navy’s Reserve Squadron and the Tragedy of Unpreparedness
top_signals.summary:
It is in long periods of peace that victories and defeats are prepared. Peace is the period for men of government, just as war is for men of action. Without the calm preparation carried out by the former, the courage and energy of the latter are of no use. — Captain First Class Ramón Auñón y Villalón, 1885.The Spanish-American War is widely remembered as a moment of triumph for the United States and a disaster for Spain. The war began in 1898 after Spain. The war began in 1898 after Spain’s brutal effort to suppress Cuba’s independence revolt, American outrage

The post Cascading Failure: The Spanish Navy’s Reserve Squadron and the Tragedy of Unpreparedness appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Argentina Bonds Jump, 2035s Hit Record High on S&P Upgrade
top_signals.summary: Argentina’s dollar bonds jumped across the curve on Thursday, with longer-dated securities rising more than 2 cents on the dollar after the country secured its second credit-rating upgrade in less than two months.

top_signals.title: Oil market defies predictions of summer supply crunch - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Oil market defies predictions of summer supply crunch  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: CISA to transform how it assesses cyber vulnerabilities and risks, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: A binding operational directive being released Wednesday will direct federal agencies to change the way they address vulnerabilities by elevating some while putting others to the side.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
